testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
13:31:58.411 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [org.example.frases.FrasesApplicationTests]: FrasesApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:31:58.697 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration org.example.frases.FrasesApplication for test class org.example.frases.FrasesApplicationTests 13:31:58.947 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [org.example.frases.FrasesApplicationTests]: FrasesApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:31:58.953 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration org.example.frases.FrasesApplication for test class org.example.frases.FrasesApplicationTests 13:31:59.194 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-06-22T13:32:11.233-06:00 WARN 19720 --- [Frases] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\moram\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
